field.name: Internal name
field.snippet_helper: The preview text appears in the inbox before opening the email.

step1.title: Recipient lists
step1.description: Select the contact lists you want to send this campaign to.
step1.no_lists: No lists available. Create a contact list first.
step1.no_taxonomy_filters: No filters available for this list

step2.title: Email content
step2.description: Compose your campaign content. Use placeholders to personalize the message.

step3.title: Template & style
step3.description: Choose the template layout and customize the colors of your email.
step3.global_style_help: Turn on to override the defaults from the selected list(s).
step3.no_lists_selected: No list selected: add a list in step 1 to see its defaults applied.
step3.using_single_list_defaults: Colors and fonts from the selected list will be used.
step3.multi_list_strategy: You selected multiple lists: choose which style to apply.
step3.logo_url_helper: URL of the logo image to display in the header. Leave empty to use text logo.

step4.title: Final actions
step4.description: Review the campaign summary and choose how to proceed.
step4.test_email_desc: Receive a preview of the email at your address to verify the final result.
step4.draft_desc: Save the campaign as a draft to edit or send it later.
step4.template_desc: Save this campaign as a reusable template for future campaigns.
step4.schedule_desc: Set a date and time for automatic campaign delivery.
step4.send_now_desc: Immediately start sending the campaign to all recipients.
step4.send_now_dialog_desc: You are about to send the campaign to {count} recipients. This action cannot be undone.
step4.max_emails_error: You can add up to 5 email addresses
step4.send_now_coming: Send functionality coming in a future sprint

empty.title: No templates available
empty.description: Save a campaign as a template from the wizard to reuse it in the future.

success.used: Campaign created from template. Edit the details and proceed with sending.

mail_list_ids.required: Please select at least one recipient list

confirm.title: Confirm campaign send
confirm.body: You are about to send campaign "{name}" to {count} recipients. This action cannot be undone.

progress.title: Sending in progress…
progress.background_note: The send will continue in the background even if you close this window.
